# PRD: {{Short product or feature name}}

> Copy this file into a working location (e.g., `docs/prds/NNNN-name.md` when that directory exists, or a Perplexity/workspace draft first). Keep the PRD concise — link out to ADRs, research, and Linear issues rather than inlining.

- **Owner:** Ben Elliott
- **Status:** draft | in-review | approved | archived
- **Related Linear:** LAT-XX, LAT-YY
- **Related ADRs:** ADR-XXXX

## 1. Problem Statement

What problem are we solving, for whom, and why now? One paragraph.

## 2. Goals

1. ...
2. ...

## 3. Non-Goals

1. ...
2. ...

## 4. Primary Users

Role, needs, constraints.

## 5. Operating Model / Workflow

How does this fit into the Perplexity → Linear → repo flow? What approval gates apply?

## 6. Requirements

Functional and non-functional. Prefer lists over prose.

## 7. Approval & Autonomy

What requires human approval? What can agents do unattended?

## 8. Risks and Open Questions

Call out unresolved decisions. Link to any ADRs they may become.

## 9. Success Metrics

How will we know this worked? Both product metrics and workflow metrics (cost, rework, human interventions).

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
